meaning: n.捕捉,捕获物,(窗)钩v.捕获,赶上(车船等),发觉,感染(疾病)vi.抓住,燃着
examples: You'll be sorry if I catch you!
We can catch the early morning train.
Can you catch the waiter's eye?
You'll be able to catch James all summer long as he tours our fine country.
So get on the bus, catch a train, rent a car or saddle up your bike.
